ground_truth.title: Skin Care 101: Your All-in-One Crash Course | Clean & Clear®
ground_truth.main_content: Everything you need to know about the basics of skin care, from skin health to product types, all in one place. Explore our comprehensive crash course.
with: Everything you need to know about the basics of skin care, from skin health to product types, all in one place.
Skin Care 101: Your All-in-One Crash Course
Your skin is your body's largest organ, and it deserves the best care possible.
Understanding your skin type is the first step to building an effective skincare routine.

items.alt: A person holds a blue object against their cheek, set against a background of pink and red gradient shapes.
Three people apply facial cream, smiling and gently massaging their cheeks. The background is a warm gradient of orange and peach, creating a bright, cheerful atmosphere.
items.caption: Three people apply facial cream, smiling and gently massaging their cheeks

items.alt: Left side shows two white cream dots on brown skin; right side features a hand applying a white pad on facial skin, suggesting a skincare routine. Black background.
items.caption: Left side shows two white cream dots on brown skin; right side features a hand applying cream
